intent.target_audience: Tech recruiters, Startup founders, Engineering managers, Other developers, Potential collaborators

responsibilities: Links to live demos or case studies
Links to live demos or case studies

tailwind.card: bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 rounded-xl shadow-lg p-6
tailwind.btn_primary: bg-blue-600 hover:opacity-90 text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-xl font-semibold transition-all
tailwind.btn_secondary: border border-blue-300 text-blue-700 px-6 py-3 rounded-xl hover:bg-blue-50 transition-all
tailwind.bg_page: bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-900 via-slate-800 to-slate-900 min-h-screen text-white
tailwind.input: w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-900 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500
